description: A safety manager needs to generate the OSHA 300 log of work-related injuries and illnesses for the previous month.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all safety incident reports from the last month.

expected_outcome.value: A list of all incidents from the specified period is retrieved.

nodes.task_description: Filter the reports to include only OSHA-recordable incidents.

expected_outcome.value: The list is filtered to only include incidents that meet OSHA recording criteria.

nodes.task_description: Generate the OSHA 300 log in the standard format using the filtered data.

expected_outcome.value: A correctly formatted OSHA 300 log is generated as a PDF.
